svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart TD
 FC["Form Container"] --> S["Section (for each)"]
 S --> SP["Section Prefix"]
 S --> G["Group (for each)"]
 S --> SX["Section Postfix"]
 G --> GP["Group Prefix"]
 G --> R["Row (for each)"]
 G --> GX["Group Postfix"]
 R --> RP["Row Prefix"]
 R --> I["Input (for each)"]
 R --> RX["Row Postfix"]
 I --> IT["Input Template (by InputType or DataType)"]
","style":"notebook"}
